svg.text: scrape → analyze → match → generate → review → export — LLM-assisted pipeline, run nightly and by hand, surfaced in Obsidian, Streamlit & Telegram
⏰ NIGHTLY AUTOMATION — job_scout_nightly.sh · Hermes cron, Archivist profile
scraper_saved.py → run.py --site {indeed · reed · guardian · adzuna} (headless, 1500s cap each — LinkedIn skipped, needs interactive login) → same pipeline below, unattended
Playwright stealth scrapers · scraper_google.py exists but is not enabled in config.yaml
lives OUTSIDE the repo · never overwritten by generators
SKILL_SYNONYMS maps job wording → your skills

g.text: auto-ingested on every run — extraction never requires a separate step

svg.text: ↑ bypasses analyzer/filter — pre-scored by hand, dispatched as its own run.py subprocess

g.text: · level classification is title-only + word-boundary keywords; unknown → LLM reads the description
· duplicate postings merged only when descriptions match (URLs kept as duplicate_urls)
· 5 axes: skills 40 · experience 25 · context 20 · location 10 · salary 5 — weights live-tunable in UI

svg.text: LLM LAYER — llm_client.py · analysis chain (bulk) + review chain (reviewer.py, shortlisted only)
REVIEW CHAIN — mistral-medium primary → 4 independent fallbacks · verified 2026-07-18
REVIEW — reviewer.py · runs after YOUR manual edits, before PDF export
never rewrites the document — only flags factual issues, job-fit gaps, style; calls the REVIEW CHAIN above
review_score_threshold: 85 (config.yaml) — badge only, human still decides

g.text: incremental job DB · URL-dedup against every known posting
context_source: llm | tfidf · summaries preserved across re-runs
never shrinks — filtered jobs stay in the DB
match reports · categories + scores in YAML frontmatter
reviewer.py findings · linked from report frontmatter
A4 export on demand from the PDF tab
application-pipeline board data, read by Obsidian
Dataview queries over YAML frontmatter — filter by
categories · report ⇄ CV ⇄ cover letter wikilinks
🌙 nightly_scout.py digest — new matches since last run
delivered via Archivist profile's own bot (Hermes gateway)
unattended overnight run · quiet night → nothing sent
